title: Cipla Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cipla Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Cipla Global Group are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Bengaluru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cipla Global Group:
Cipla Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla Global Group!
